summary: Frontend-only testing for UI layout change on Trade Monitor page. All tests PASSED. 3-column grid layout (Your Time + Today's Summary + Merin panel) is working correctly with equal heights. Trade History card is full-width below the grid. Mobile view correctly hides Merin panel and shows mobile button.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: 3-column grid layout on Trade Monitor page:
- Grid container has correct classes: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3
- All 3 cards (time-card, todays-summary-card, merin-panel) have equal height (262px)
- All 3 cards aligned in same row (Y position: 942px)
- trade-history-card positioned below grid at Y: 1228px (full width)
- merin-panel hidden on mobile (has 'hidden lg:flex' class)
VERIFIED: Regression - Profit Tracker page loads correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 91 verified the UI layout change on Trade Monitor page. The 3-column grid (Your Time + Today's Summary + Merin panel) is working correctly with lg:grid-cols-3 CSS class. Trade History card is full-width below. On mobile, Merin panel is hidden and merin-open-button is shown. Key data-testids: time-card, todays-summary-card, merin-panel, merin-iframe, merin-refresh-button, trade-history-card, merin-open-button.

verified_features.details: Your Time, Today's Summary, and Merin panel displayed in row with equal heights (262px)
trade-history-card positioned below 3-column grid at full width
merin-iframe loads meringlobaltrading.com correctly inside merin-panel
Shows SELL MOIL10 signal with trade time and user's local time
Shows profit entry form with Submit & See Results button
merin-panel hidden on mobile (has 'hidden lg:flex' class)

Loads with Account Value, Deposits, Projection Vision, growth chart
